message:
🐛 Preserve isDemo flag when falling back to universal stats (#1572)

When createMergedStatValueGetter falls back from a dashboard-specific
getter to the universal getter, carry over the isDemo flag from the
dashboard value if the universal value doesn't set one. This ensures
consistent demo styling across all stat blocks (e.g., alerts_firing
on Cluster Admin dashboard).

Addresses Copilot review feedback on PR #1570.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
